scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && ( [ -f admindashboard/package.json ] && npm --prefix admindashboard install || echo "admindashboard/package.json not found; skipping admin install" )
scripts.build:admin: set -e; if [ -f admindashboard/package.json ]; then npm --prefix admindashboard run build; else echo "admindashboard/package.json not found; using prebuilt dist"; fi; rm -rf server/public/admindashboard; mkdir -p server/public/admindashboard; if [ -d admindashboard/dist ]; then cp -R admindashboard/dist/* server/public/admindashboard/; else echo "admindashboard/dist not found"; fi
scripts.start: npm run build:admin && npm --prefix server start
scripts.build: npm --prefix server install && npm run build:admin && npm --prefix server run build
